name: Chinese Chicken Strata
recipeIngredient: 1 can Water chestnuts, sliced and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine diced chicken, soy sauce, rice vinegar, sesame oil, chili paste with garlic, 1 teaspoon dry mustard, scallions, red bell pepper, and water chestnuts. Mix well.
2. Turn half the bread cubes into a buttered 11 x 7 baking dish. Sprinkle with half the cheese.
3. Distribute half the chicken mixture over the cheese.
4. Cover with remaining bread cubes and remaining 1 teaspoon dry mustard until blended.
5. Pour evenly over casserole.
6. Cover with plastic wrap. Refrigerate several hours, or overnight.
7. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
8. Bake, uncovered, 40 to 45 minutes, until top is golden and center is set. Let cool 5 minutes, then cut into squares or rectangles to serve.
